raw_user_request: Build a Chrome extension that saves article snippets.
concrete_goal: Create a Chrome extension for researchers to save article snippets, tag sources, search saved notes, and reopen source pages from a user-facing browser toolbar workflow.
success_criteria: Users can add, edit, save, tag, filter, and reopen article snippet records from the extension popup.
The extension shows saved snippets, empty state guidance, validation for missing snippet text, and saved-success status.
The popup layout remains readable at browser-extension dimensions without clipped controls.
scope_in: Chrome extension popup UI for saving article snippets.
Local browser storage for fictional snippet records.
Search, tag, edit, save, delete, validation, and empty states.
scope_out: Account sync, paid APIs, external bookmarking services, and production store submission.
assumptions: Local browser storage is acceptable for a prototype.
Snippet examples use fictional article titles and source URLs.
implementation_constraints: Do not add paid services or external article APIs.
Keep the popup workflow usable without a backend.

scenario_flows.name: Save article snippet
preconditions: The extension popup is open on an article page.
steps: Create a snippet with selected text, source title, URL, and tags.
Save the snippet and filter by one tag.
Open the saved source link from the popup.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The saved snippet appears in the popup list, matches the tag filter, and preserves the source URL.
failure_or_edge_cases: Missing snippet text shows validation and disables save.
Empty search results show reset guidance.

verification_matrix.build: Run the extension build command when present.
verification_matrix.lint: Run lint or equivalent static checks when present.
verification_matrix.run: Load or open the extension popup locally.
verification_matrix.behavior_check: Check save, edit, filter, validation, empty, and popup layout behavior.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Popup screenshot and behavior evidence for saving, filtering, reopening, validation, accessibility, and state coverage.
iteration_policy: Rework until the review score reaches the quality threshold.

delegation_plan_seed.objective: Build the Chrome article snippet extension.
